columns.name: quarter
columns.description: Quarter label YYYY-QN or 'overlap_window' for ICC rows

columns.name: metric_name
columns.description: Closed enum: psi, cohen_h, cohen_d, ks_stat, icc_lpm_observed_scale, icc_anova_observed_scale, icc_glmm_latent_scale

columns.name: metric_ci_low
columns.description: Lower bound of 95% CI; NULL for PSI/cohen/KS (no CI in schema)

columns.name: metric_ci_high
columns.description: Upper bound of 95% CI; NULL for PSI/cohen/KS

columns.name: cohort_threshold
columns.description: Min matches in reference for cohort inclusion. 0 = uncohort-filtered primary (v1.0.5 sentinel). NULL = missing metadata (block Phase 06 ingest).

columns.name: sample_size
columns.description: N rows in tested period for this row

m3_note: Spec §1 9-col contract differs from actual VIEW schema. Per INVARIANTS §5 I8 partial: feature_name values match actual VIEW schema (faction/opponent_faction/duration_seconds). Phase 06 UNION joins on metric_name only.

v105_notes.cohort_threshold_sentinel: cohort_threshold=0 = uncohort-filtered primary analysis (B2 critique fix). Pre-v1.0.5 sc2egset emitted NULL here, which was ambiguous between B2-uncohort and missing-metadata. NULL is now reserved for metadata gaps (ingest block).
v105_notes.metric_ci_columns: CI bounds for a metric live in metric_ci_low/metric_ci_high on the same row as the metric (previously aoe2companion emitted CI bounds as separate rows with metric_name=icc_lpm_ci_low/ci_high — now banned by the closed enumeration).
v105_notes.metric_name_enum: Closed set; consumers MUST reject rows with unlisted metric_name values.

b3_note: ICC has 3 metric_name values: icc_lpm_observed_scale (diagnostic; §8 v1.0.2 demoted), icc_anova_observed_scale (PRIMARY v1.0.4 §14(b)), icc_glmm_latent_scale (tertiary, may be NULL).
